title: Minor offences
content:
(1)	
Any person who contravenes section 18(2), 26, 27, 28(2), 
29, 30, 41AA(4) or (5), 41F(1), 41G, 44, 45, 47(1), 49A or 
72A(1) or (2) shall be guilty of an offence.
Last updated date
29.6.2017
Employment Ordinance
Part XIII	
13-8
Section 63B	
Cap. 57
Verified Copy
	
(2)	
A person who is guilty of an offence under this section is 
liable on conviction to a fine at level 3.
(Added 103 of 1995 s. 22)

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
